NETWORK: Network error. Either our servers are down or your Internet connection is unstable.
TOO_MANY_REQUEST: Too many requests, please try again later
NO_CLASS_CHOSEN: Please select the course you want to enroll in
MISSING_CLASS_DATA: The course information is missing, please choose again
SERVER_ERROR: We cannot authenticate your account. Please refresh the page or login again.
WRONG_DOMAIN: This domain does not exists. Please check the link you have entered

PAYMENT.failed: Failed to proceed to the next step. You have likely applied for a class that is full. Please contact the educator directly.
PAYMENT.serverError: An unknown error is encountered. Please use the 'Enquire' button to contact technical support.
PAYMENT.message: Unable to process your payment. Please try again later.
PAYMENT.invalidPhone: *The phone number is invalid. Please enter a valid phone number.
PAYMENT.creditCardNotActivated: The educator has not activated this payment method. Please try the 'pay by cash or bank' method.

AUTHENTICATE.PLEASE_AUTHENTICATE: You are not yet logged in. Please refresh the page or try logging in again.
AUTHENTICATE.ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND: Login failed. Please check your email or password.

VALIDATE.FIELD_REQUIRED: Please fill in this required field
VALIDATE.AT_LEAST_ONE_OPTION: Please select at least one option
VALIDATE.MUST_SELECT_YES: You must select 'yes' for this question

COUPON.EXPIRED: Coupon has expired or is invalid

ENROL.CLASS_QUOTA_IS_FULL: The class you have chosen is full. Please pick another class.
ENROL.START_TIME_EARLIER_THAN_END_TIME: The start time is earlier than the end time. Please check your input again.
ENROL.PLEASE_PICK_STARTING_LESSON: Please pick your starting lesson first.
ENROL.COURSE_NOT_OPEN: This course is not open for application. Please contact the educator directly
ENROL.WORKSHOP_NOT_OPEN: This workshop is not open for application. Please contact the educator directly
ENROL.COURSE_RECRUITMENT_NOT_STARTED: The course has not started recruiting students yet. Please contact the educator directly
ENROL.DATE_PICKED_IS_IN_PAST: The starting date you picked is in the past. Please pick another date
ENROL.INCORRECT_DATA_FORMAT: The data you have entered is incorrect. Please check your input again or contact technical support.
ENROL.RECORDNOTFOUND: Unable to find a previous booking
ENROL.ONLINE_PAYMENT_NOT_AVAILABLE: Online payment is not available for this course. You can still pay using digital payment methods and then upload the receipt for verification.
ENROL.LESSON_DATE_TIME_BLOCKED: The date and time you have chosen is not available. Please pick another date and time.
ENROL.PAYMENT_AMOUNT_TOO_LOW: The payment amount set by the educator is invalid. Please contact the educator directly with the button below.
ENROL.DUPLICATE_ENROLLMENT: You have already enrolled in this course. Please contact the educator directly.
ENROL.URL_NOT_FOUND: The link you have entered is not valid. Please check the link and try again.
ENROL.REGISTRATION_ERROR: I'm sorry, we have encountered an error during your registration. Here are the error messages:
ENROL.CONTACT_SUPPORT: Note that your registration has not been completed. Please contact our support to let us know and we will help you proceed in the registration.
